revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}
[[:Category:日本の建築史 (時代別)|時代別建築]] | - [[:Category:江戸時代の建築|江戸時代]] - [[:Category:明治時代の建築|明治時代]] - [[:Category:大正時代の建築|大正時代]] - [[:Category:昭和時代の建築|昭和時代]] - [[:Category:平成時代の建築|平成時代]]
日本の[[明治]]時代（[[1868年]][[1月25日]]〜[[1912年]][[7月30日]]）の建築に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:西洋館]] * [[:Category:近代建築]]
{{デフォルトソート:めいししたい}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:明治時代の建築]]|version=74131484}} [[ja:Category:明治時代の建築]]
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}
[[:Category:日本の建築史 (時代別)|時代別建築]] | - [[:Category:江戸時代の建築|江戸時代]] - [[:Category:明治時代の建築|明治時代]] - [[:Category:大正時代の建築|大正時代]] - [[:Category:昭和時代の建築|昭和時代]] - [[:Category:平成時代の建築|平成時代]]
日本の[[明治]]時代（[[1868年]][[1月25日]]〜[[1912年]][[7月30日]]）の建築に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:西洋館]] * [[:Category:近代建築]]
{{デフォルトソート:めいししたい}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:明治時代の建築]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-15T20:57:51Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:1908年竣工の日本の建築物]].
(2025-05-15T13:39:34Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kotohira-gū]].
{{Commons category|Architecture of the Meiji era}}
[[commons:Category:Architecture of the Meiji era]] [[ja:Category:明治時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:메이지 시대의 건축]] [[zh:Category:明治時代建築]] [[Category:19th-century architecture]] [[Category:20th-century architecture]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Meiji era]]
[[Category:Original categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:明治時代の文化]] [[Category:近代建築]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Merge [[Category:明治時代の文化]] into [[Category:Culture of the Meiji era]] via bot
Merge [[Category:近代建築]] into [[Category:Modern Architecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}
[[:Category:日本の建築史 (時代別)|時代別建築]] | - [[:Category:江戸時代の建築|江戸時代]] - [[:Category:明治時代の建築|明治時代]] - [[:Category:大正時代の建築|大正時代]] - [[:Category:昭和時代の建築|昭和時代]] - [[:Category:平成時代の建築|平成時代]]
日本の[[明治]]時代（[[1868年]][[1月25日]]〜[[1912年]][[7月30日]]）の建築に関するカテゴリ。
== 関連カテゴリ == * [[:Category:西洋館]] * [[:Category:近代建築]]
{{デフォルトソート:めいししたい}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}
[[:Category:日本の建築史 (時代別)|時代別建築]] | - [[:Category:江戸時代の建築|江戸時代]] - [[:Category:明治時代の建築|明治時代]] - [[:Category:大正時代の建築|大正時代]] - [[:Category:昭和時代の建築|昭和時代]] - [[:Category:平成時代の建築|平成時代]]
日本の[[明治]]時代（[[1868年]][[1月25日]]〜[[1912年]][[7月30日]]）の建築に関するカテゴリ。

Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}

{{デフォルトソート:めいししたい}} ==Local Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}} {{citation needed|めいししたい}} {{Commons category|Architecture of the Meiji era}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:明治時代の建築}} {{translated page|ja|Category:明治時代の建築|version=74131484}} [[co:commons:Category:Architecture of the Meiji era]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:明治時代の建築]] [[ko:Category:메이지 시대의 건축]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:1908年竣工の日本の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kotohira-gū]] [[zh:Category:明治時代建築]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q9683379}} [[Category:19th-century architecture]] [[Category:20th-century architecture]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of the Meiji era]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Meiji era]] [[Category:Modern Architecture]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|歴史|日本の歴史|明治時代|明治時代の文化|frame=1}} {{Commonscat}}
[[:Category:日本の建築史 (時代別)|時代別建築]] | - [[:Category:江戸時代の建築|江戸時代]] - [[:Category:明治時代の建築|明治時代]] - [[:Category:大正時代の建築|大正時代]] - [[:Category:昭和時代の建築|昭和時代]] - [[:Category:平成時代の建築|平成時代]]
